reviews.comment: I drove an hour each way just to have my Civic Hatch tinted by Frederick Window Tint because of their expertise in tinting without removing the 3rd brake light on the hatch, and I am so glad I did. Sharyn was insanely knowledgeable at the front desk addressing questions, offering suggestions and explaining options. She was also direct and honest which made the decision so much easier and the communication effortless. The work was flawless and quick but done with so much carefor my vehicle. It turned out exactly as I wanted and I cannot recommend them enough. I will come back anytime I need any tinting work done because their customer service and work speaks volumes.

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much!
